components.name: Button
components.keyInsight: Sharp, zero-radius action control with offset shadow and monochrome weight.

components.name: Card
components.keyInsight: Flat analytical panel with bright border and strict spacing rhythm.

components.name: Input
components.keyInsight: Dense field treatment with strong contrast, mono typing, and visible focus.

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.keyInsight: Dedicated sidebar token family drives a structured command-center navigation shell.

components.name: Data Table
components.keyInsight: Grid-first reporting table with quiet surfaces and emphatic metric contrast.

components.name: Chart Panel
components.keyInsight: Blue chart scale lives inside restrained panels, keeping accent color scarce and meaningful.

crossComponentPatterns.shapeLanguage: Square-first composition with 0 radius and crisp borders.
crossComponentPatterns.spacingRhythm: 4px base spacing token with compact dashboard density.
crossComponentPatterns.shadowStyle: Offset black shadow creates a neo-brutalist control edge.
crossComponentPatterns.typography: Monospace-first interface voice using Geist Mono.
crossComponentPatterns.colorApproach: Neutral grayscale foundation with a single electric blue accent and dedicated chart blues.
